about.title: About Us
about.p1: In today's world, businesses thrive on connections that cross oceans and continents. At CP Freight Forwarders LLP, we are more than a logistics company—we are a global trade enabler. For decades, we've been trusted by exporters, importers, manufacturers, distributors, and corporates to simplify international shipping and ensure their cargo reaches destinations with efficiency, compliance, and care.
about.p2: With an integrated suite of services—ocean freight, air freight, customs clearance, road and rail transport, project logistics, and supply chain solutions—we deliver end-to-end freight forwarding that combines speed, cost-efficiency, and transparency.
about.p3: At CP Freight Forwarders LLP, every consignment matters—because we don't just move cargo, we move businesses forward.
about.story.h2: Our Story of Manufacturing Excellence Built on.
about.story.p1: At CP Freight Forwarders LLP, we are more than freight forwarders—we are global trade partners. With decades of experience in international logistics, freight forwarding, and supply chain management, we have helped businesses of every size—from small exporters to multinational corporations—navigate the complexities of global commerce with ease.
about.story.p2: Founded with the vision of becoming a bridge between markets, we combine local expertise with a worldwide network of partners, ensuring every shipment reaches its destination safely, on time, and with full compliance.
about.story.approach_title: Our approach is simple yet powerful:
about.story.p3: Whether it's ocean freight, air freight, customs brokerage, or multimodal project logistics, we are committed to creating value at every stage of the supply chain.
about.mission.p: To enable businesses across industries to access the world seamlessly by delivering reliable, efficient, and sustainable logistics solutions.
about.vision.p: To be recognized globally as the most trusted logistics partner—one that fuels international growth, builds lasting relationships, and sets new benchmarks in freight forwarding.
about.journey.step1.label: STEP 01
about.journey.step1.p: Humble beginnings as a small-scale logistics service.
about.journey.step2.label: STEP 02

about.journey.step4.label: STEP 04
about.journey.step4.p: Recognized as a leading Indian freight forwarder with global reach.
about.journey.step5.label: STEP 05
about.journey.step5.p: Serving hundreds of clients across 50+ countries, powering trade across industries.

services.title: Our Services
service.ocean.title: Ocean Freight
service.ocean.desc: Flexible and cost-effective sea freight solutions across all major global trade lanes.
service.ocean.detail.p: We specialize in cost-effective and reliable ocean freight forwarding services that connect businesses to global markets. Whether you need FCL, LCL, break-bulk, or Ro-Ro shipping, our dedicated team ensures smooth end-to-end handling. From port-to-port solutions to door-to-door delivery, we make international trade simpler.
service.air.title: Air Freight
service.air.desc: Time-sensitive and high-value shipment solutions with speed and security.
service.air.detail.p: When speed is critical, our air freight services provide unmatched reliability. We partner with leading airlines to offer priority cargo space, express solutions, and charter services. From small parcels to large shipments, our air logistics expertise ensures timely and secure delivery anywhere in the world.
service.customs.title: Customs Clearance
service.customs.desc: Expert customs brokerage to simplify documentation and ensure compliance.
service.customs.detail.p: Regulatory compliance is the backbone of international trade. Our expert customs clearance services take care of documentation, tariff classification, duty payments, and compliance checks. With on-ground presence at major ports and airports, we guarantee hassle-free clearance and minimal delays.
service.road.title: Road & Rail Transport
service.road.desc: Reliable domestic distribution through road and rail networks.
service.road.detail.p: The last mile matters. Our road and rail transport solutions bridge the gap between ports, warehouses, and factories. With a reliable network, advanced fleet management, and intermodal logistics capabilities, we ensure smooth domestic distribution.
service.project.title: Project Cargo & Special Logistics
service.project.desc: End-to-end planning and execution for oversized and complex cargo.
service.project.detail.p: From wind turbines to industrial machinery, project cargo requires specialized planning. Our experts provide route surveys, lifting solutions, multimodal transport, and end-to-end execution for oversized and heavy-lift cargo. Trusted by industries like construction, energy, oil & gas, and infrastructure, we deliver precision and reliability.
service.supply.title: Supply Chain Solutions
service.supply.desc: Warehousing, inventory management, and distribution solutions.
service.supply.detail.p: Modern businesses need agile supply chains. Our solutions include warehousing, distribution, inventory management, and vendor consolidation. With digital tracking and compliance-driven processes, we empower businesses with efficient and scalable supply chain models.
services.cta.label: Ready to Ship?

why.title: Why Us ?
why.sub: At CP Freight Forwarders LLP, we position ourselves as a strategic partner in your business journey.
why.item1.title: End-to-End Logistics Under One Roof
why.item1.desc: From international freight forwarding to customs clearance, warehousing, last-mile delivery, and supply chain solutions.
why.item2.title: Global Network, Local Strength
why.item2.desc: Strategic tie-ups with shipping lines, airlines, and logistics partners worldwide.
why.item3.title: Trusted by Diverse Industries
why.item3.desc: Serving exporters, importers, SMEs, and multinationals across multiple sectors.
why.item4.title: Technology-Enabled Efficiency
why.item4.desc: Digital platforms for real-time tracking and transparent communication.
group.title: Our Group Companies / Integrated Ecosystem
group.p: Together, these entities form a powerful logistics ecosystem that ensures end-to-end solutions.
sus.intro.h2: Our Commitment to a Greener Future
sus.intro.p1: Sustainability is not an option—it is a responsibility. At CP Freight Forwarders LLP, we believe that freight forwarding and logistics can be a force for positive change. As businesses expand globally, we ensure growth doesn't come at the cost of the planet.
sus.intro.p2: Our green logistics initiatives focus on reducing environmental impact, promoting efficient supply chains, and investing in technologies that align with sustainable growth.
sus.commit1.p: Partnering with shipping lines and airlines adopting low-emission technologies. Promoting eco-friendly routing and optimized transit schedules to minimize fuel usage.
sus.commit2.p: Moving towards e-invoicing, e-manifests, and digital trade documentation, reducing paper waste across our entire operations.
sus.commit3.p: Helping clients adopt leaner inventory models and consolidated shipments to reduce unnecessary cargo movement and minimize environmental impact.
sus.people.li1: Supporting local communities along trade routes.
sus.people.li2: Prioritizing safety, training, and fair practices for everyone in our ecosystem.
sus.future.li1: Commitment to UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).
sus.future.li2: Regularly upgrading processes to align with global sustainability benchmarks.
sus.quote.h3: By integrating sustainability into logistics, we don't just move cargo responsibly—we build a future where global trade and environmental balance go hand in hand.
sus.cta.label: Join Our Journey
sus.cta.h2: Let's Build a Sustainable Future Together.
career.hero.h1:
A Career That
Moves You Forward.
career.intro.h2: Be Part of Something That Moves the World
career.intro.p1: At CP Freight Forwarders LLP, logistics isn't just about moving cargo—it's about moving people, ideas, and careers forward. We believe our strength lies in our people, and we are always looking for passionate individuals who want to grow in the fast-evolving logistics and supply chain industry.
career.intro.p2: We offer an environment where your ideas matter, your growth is supported, and your work makes a real impact in shaping global trade.
career.why.card1.p: Work on projects spanning multiple industries and countries, gaining world-class experience.
career.why.card2.p: Structured training programs and mentorship from industry leaders at every stage of your journey.
career.why.card3.p: A workplace built on respect, teamwork, and collaboration where every voice matters.
career.why.card4.p: Opportunities to work with the latest logistics technologies and shape the future of global trade.
career.why.card5.p: Be part of a company making a real difference for the future of our planet and communities.
career.why.card6.p: Attractive compensation packages, health benefits, and opportunities for career advancement.
